title: Chloe's Animal Food Friends
synopsis: Baby Chloe discovers magical animal friends who love to share delicious foods together in a colorful, appetizing adventure.

pages.text: Chloe sees a bunny. The bunny has carrots!

illustration.description: A cheerful little girl with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes sits next to a fluffy white bunny holding bright orange carrots with sparkles and steam rising from them in magical swirls
illustration.alt: Chloe with a bunny and magical carrots

pages.text: A bear brings honey. Sweet honey drips down!

illustration.description: A friendly brown bear holds a golden honey pot with thick honey dripping down in sparkly streams while Chloe with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes claps her hands in delight
illustration.alt: Bear with honey and happy Chloe

pages.text: Fish swim with apples. Red apples float!

illustration.description: Colorful fish swim around bright red apples floating in sparkling water with steam and magical sparkles while Chloe with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes watches with wonder
illustration.alt: Fish swimming with floating apples and Chloe

pages.text: Chloe eats with friends. Yum yum yum!

illustration.description: Chloe with short wavy strawberry-blonde hair, light skin, blue-gray eyes sits at a magical feast table with the bunny, bear, and fish, surrounded by steaming carrots, dripping honey, and sparkling apples in a joyful celebration
illustration.alt: Chloe enjoying a feast with animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: delicious appetizing food, exaggerated proportions, steam drips sparkles, magical food, diverse cuisines, feast celebration, cooking scenes, yummy visual, food joy

questions.question: What does the bear bring?
questions.explanation: The bear brings sweet honey that drips down!

questions.question: What do the fish swim with?
questions.explanation: The fish swim with red apples that float!
